include D:/AFsim/AFSim/afsim-2.9.0-win64/demos/sensor_demos/scenarios/eoir_demo.txt

event_pipe
   file output/eoir_demo_generated.aer
end_event_pipe

event_output
   file output/eoir_demo_generated.evt
   enable SENSOR_DETECTION_ATTEMPT
   enable SENSOR_DETECTION_CHANGED
   enable SENSOR_MODE_ACTIVATED
   enable SENSOR_MODE_DEACTIVATED
   enable SENSOR_TRACK_INITIATED
   enable SENSOR_TRACK_DROPPED
   enable SENSOR_TURNED_ON
   enable SENSOR_TURNED_OFF
end_event_output

end_time 20 min
